industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Zheneng Jinjiang Environment Holding Company Limited
summary: Zheneng Jinjiang Environment Holding Company Limited generates and sells electricity and steam in the People's Republic of China, India, and internationally. The company operates through Waste-To-Energy Project Construction and Operation; and Project Technical and Management Service, Equipment Selection, and EMC Business segments. The company also provides waste treatment services; project management, technical consulting and advisory, equipment selection, and energy management contracting services; and construction services under service concession arrangement. In addition, it operates thermal power plants. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 22 waste-to-energy facilities, an organic waste treatment facility, and 6 resource recycling projects in 13 provinces, autonomous regions, and centrally-administered municipalities in China with a total waste treatment capacity of 38,060 tons/day and an installed electricity power generation capacity of 718 MW. The company was formerly known as China Jinjiang Environment Holding Company Limited and changed its name to Zheneng Jinjiang Environment Holding Company Limited in November 2019. Zheneng Jinjiang Environment Holding Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
